title: Add desktop linked workflow start API/types
depends_on: T009: desktop workflow template API/types implemented
T021: linked workflow start API route implemented
objective: Add desktop client method and types for POST /api/sessions/:id/workflow/start, link metadata, context strategy, and contract errors.
anti_goals: Do not implement UI strategy dialog here.
Do not hide server error codes.
Do not silently retry duplicate starts without clientRequestId semantics.
acceptance_criteria: Client method sends workflow, contextStrategy, summaryInstructions, and clientRequestId.
Types model link response and source/target metadata.
API tests cover route path and payload.
